titleStmt.title: SII 40.271: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 271. (A.R. No. B. 316 of 1933.) Nārṇepāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a broken Nandi pillar opposite to the temple of Bhīmēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1188, Jyēshṭha, śu. 11, Sunday, corresponding to 1266 A.D., May 16.

Records the gift of 25 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sōmēśvara of Nārāyaṇapāḍu by Mōṟampūḍi Malli-Nāyaka. The gift was entrusted to Prōliyabōya son of Iruga-sāni for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1188 gunēṁṭṭi jēṣṭa
śuddha 11 Ādivāramuna mōṟaṁpūḍi
mallināyuṁḍudama tallidaṁḍru
laku dhammārtthaṁmugā nārāyanu
pāṭi śrī sōmēśvara mahādēvaraku Akhaṁṇḍavartti dī
pamunakuṁ beṭṭina goṟiyalu 25 vī
niṁjēkoni Irugasāni koḍku prōliya
bōyuṇḍu danaputrānupautrikamācaṁdrarkkamugā
nitya tavveṇḍu nēyi dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyagalavā
ṇḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
